# Aditya Raj — Portfolio

> Product Manager & AI Engineer | NIT Patna

## About
Aditya Raj is a full-stack engineer, AI/ML specialist, and Product Manager 
pursuing a Dual Degree (B.Tech + M.Tech) in Mathematics and Computing Technology 
at the National Institute of Technology (NIT) Patna, expected graduation 2027.

## Work Experience
- **Product Operations Lead @ Singh Movers and Packers** (Sep 2025 – Apr 2026)
  Led product operations for a logistics technology platform serving the Australian market.
  Remote · Blacktown, New South Wales, Australia.

- **Product Manager @ Mangiee** (Sep 2024 – Aug 2025)
  Owned product operations and software product management for a food-tech platform.
  Hybrid · Patna, Bihar, India.

- **Product Manager @ ZenDen** (Feb 2024 – Nov 2024)
  Drove product vision and strategy for a wellness/lifestyle technology platform.

## Education
National Institute of Technology (NIT) Patna — B.Tech + M.Tech, 
Mathematics and Computing Technology (Expected 2027)

## Skills & Technologies
Product Management, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning,
React, TypeScript, Next.js, Python, C++, CUDA, Sales Operations, Data Analytics, SEO Strategy
